heading: Tamil Nadu Public Service Commission (Additional Functions) Rule, 2022 – Gazette Notification
text: [Regd. No. TN/CCN/467/2012-14. GOVERNMENT OF TAMIL NADU [R. Dis. No. 197/2009. 2022 [Price: Rs. 1.60 Paise. TAMIL NADU GOVERNMENT GAZETTE EXTRAORDINARY PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 170A] CHENNAI, THURSDAY, MARCH 17, 2022 Panguni 3, Pilava, Thiruvalluvar Aandu–2053 Part III—Section 1(a) General Statutory Rules, Notifications, Orders, Regulations, etc., issued by Secretariat Departments. NOTIFICATIONS BY GOVERNMENT HUMAN RESOURCES MANAGEMENT DEPARTMENT TAMIL NADU PUBLIC SERVICE COMMISSION (ADDITIONAL FUNCTIONS) RULE, 2022 G.O. (Ms) No. 30, Human Resources Management (M), 17th March 2022, ----ðƒ°Q 3, Hôõ, F¼õœÀõ˜ Ý‡´--2053.] No.SRO A.-6(c)/2022. In exercise of the powers conferred by section 7 of the Tamil Nadu Public Service Commission (Additional Functions) Act, 2022, (Tamil Nadu Act 14 of 2022), the Governor of Tamil Nadu hereby makes the following Rules, namely:-

heading: Rule 1 – Short title
text: These Rules may be called the Tamil Nadu Public Service Commission (Additional Functions) Rules, 2022

heading: Rule 2 – Definitions
text: (1) In these Rules, unless the context otherwise requires,- (a) “Act ” means the Tamil Nadu Public Service Commission (Additional Functions) Act, 2022 (Tamil Nadu Act 14 of 2022); (b) “Form” means a Form appended to these rules; (2) Words and expressions used in these Rules, but not defined, shall have the meaning assigned to them in the Act.

heading: Rule 3 – Form of Requisition
text: An organization, for recruitment of candidates for appointment to posts in that organisation, shall submit requisition to the Commission in Form A along with the ‘Estimate of Vacancies’, as prepared in Form B.

heading: Form A – Form of Requisition
text: (1) Whether the post is governed by any Act / Rules / Regulations. (Updated copy of Act / Rules / Regulations to be furnished). (2) Age and Educational Qualification: Preferential qualification, if any, (3) Exemption / Concession, if any, (4) Scale of Pay / Level attached to the post. (5) Whether the Rule of reservation of appointments applies. If so, the rotation and turn against which candidate should be selected may be stated. (6) Specific requirements in regard to physical standards and vision, if any. (7) Duties and responsibilities attached to the post (to be specified in brief) (8) Whether the post is covered under Pension / Contributory Pension Scheme? If not, specify the Rules which govern payment of terminal benefits. (9) Whether the Tamil Nadu Government Servants (Conditions of Service) Act, 2016 (Tamil Nadu Act 14 of 2016) is applicable to the post. (10) Suitability of persons with disabilities identified for the post under the Rights of Persons with Disabilities Act, 2016 (Central Act 49 of 2016). (11) Disqualification for appointment, if any. (12) Whether the roster to be continued from the previous selection. If yes, furnish the rotation / turns utilized for the post in previous recruitment  CERTIFICATION: Certified that the extract of Act / Rules / Regulations sent herewith has been prepared up to date and that no amendment so far issued has been omitted to be taken into account. Signature with designation KUMAR JAYANT, Secretary to Government (FAC).

(11)Disqualification for appointment, if any.
(12)Whether the roster to be continued from the previous selection. If yes, furnish the rotation / turns utilized for the post in previous recruitment

heading: Form B – Estimate of Vacancies
text: ESTIMATE OF VACANCIES FOR THE POST OF __________________. (The estimate of vacancies should cover a period of one year. The period for the present recruitment is from…………………. to……………………..) (1) Total cadre strength : I. Permanent II. Temporary (2) No. of retirement vacancies anticipated to arise : (3) No. of likely promotions of incumbents of : substantive posts (4) No. of new posts sanctioned permanent : / temporary post retained permanently by obtaining the sanction of the Government from time to time DEDUCT (5) No. of vacancies to be allocated for appointment : on Compassionate Ground (6) No. of posts to be apportioned for other methods : with reference to prescribed ratio (7) No. of posts likely to be disbanded : Actual No. of vacancies apportioned for direct recruitment Col. [(2)+(3)+(4)] - [(5)+(6)+(7)]  SIGNED BY: Signature with designation KUMAR JAYANT, Secretary to Government (FAC).
